projects.name: open-tamil-php
projects.description: Open Tamil PHP here to address character encoding support Tamil Characters rendering issues in PDF Generation and image generation and multiple encoding conversion support natively from PHP Idea Sparked from : https://github.com/tecnickcom/TCPDF/issues/609
projects.short_description: Open Tamil is PHP Port for https://github.com/Ezhil-Language-Foundation/open-tamil/

form.question: How to support
form.response:
See it! something needed create a issue (or)
you are good at making improvisation in it raise a pr. (or)
interested in creating testcases
contribute where ever you want you are always welcome!

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response:
Open Tamil PHP here to address character encoding support Tamil Characters rendering issues in PDF Generation and image generation and multiple encoding conversion support natively from PHP
Idea Sparked from : https://github.com/tecnickcom/TCPDF/issues/609

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: You have to wait for sometime for something. Same not applicable for everything.

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: After waiting solution for a problem though have many of faced the problem. Let start addressing it by fixing (why can't you give a try at least!) kickstarted

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
What's your open-source villain origin story?
form.response:
While looking for forums, mailing group, wandering around all the github for a pdf rendering problem. Problem drove me to
create a solution.

form.question: If you had to use one emoji to convey what it's like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
